$comment: Declarative entity-extraction rules for the rule-based extractor. Point SPECKIT_ENTITY_CONFIG_PATH at a copy of this file (or an edited copy) to add or change entity types without a code change. Each rule: type (proper_noun|technology|key_phrase|heading|quoted), pattern (RegExp source), flags (must include 'g'), captureGroup (1-based), optional trim. Rules apply in array order; results dedup by normalized text. A malformed or unreadable file falls back to the built-in rules. This reference reproduces the built-in five exactly.
